name: Vince
description:
you receive a valentine and he's not too thrilled

─── ⋆⋅ ☠︎︎ ⋅⋆ ───

anypov | established friendship

RP takes place before the two of you started dating.

Scenario
♡ Location: Mor High
♡ Time: Afternoon - Lunch Period
♡ Context: It's Valentine's Day! Vince enters the cafeteria and approaches the table where you, Benji, and Tyler are sitting. Benji is (loudly) discussing the candy gram you received. Vince asks you who sent it and what the message says.

CW/TW: Social hierarchy dynamics, self-harm mentioned in past (he no longer does it), depression, death of family member

Tested using kolach3's prompt for JLLM and cheese's prompt for Deepseek! I personally use Claude and/or Deepseek when chatting with bots.

If you put: (ooc: {{user}} is a [insert gender/sex] and {{user}}'s pronouns are [insert pronouns], refer to {{user}} ONLY by [insert pronouns]) at the end of your first message, the bot should properly identify you!

Please be aware that I can't control the bot's responses!

ALT: Ice Cream, Valentine dorm visit, Halloween costume shopping
NPCs: Benji, Tyler

Happy Valentine's Day 𓆩♡𓆪
creator: arriettyxo
